hotel_name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Flamingo Cát Bà – Quản lý bởi Flamingo Hotels & Resorts (Flamingo Cat Ba Resort – Managed by Flamingo Hotels & Resorts)

reviews.title: Mistake in booking and they just trappeped me
reviews.text: Terribe people they don't give a crap about you unless you pay, i was a guest there and there was misake in booking and didnt help me at all , just double charged me and offered zero solutions just stolen my money
reviews.response:
Dear valued guest,

We are truly sorry to read about your experience and sincerely regret the frustration and disappointment caused during your stay at Flamingo Cat Ba Resort.

Please accept our apologies for the inconvenience regarding your booking and payment issue. This is certainly not the level of service we aim to provide to our guests. We understand how upsetting this situation must have been, especially when you were expecting support and assistance from our team.

We take your feedback very seriously and would appreciate the opportunity to investigate the matter further, including the concerns related to the double charge and the handling of your reservation. Kindly contact us directly with your booking details so our management team can review the case carefully and work toward an appropriate resolution.

Your comments are important to us and will be shared internally to help improve our communication and guest support processes.

Warm regards,
Flamingo Cat Ba Resort Team

reviews.title: Very bad, do not expect 5 stars - I would avoid this place unless they invest money to remove the mould and actually cle
reviews.positives: The view is quite nice.
reviews.negatives: The hotel felt half abandoned, but the worst thing by far was that absolutely every room ( and we looked at several) had mould. Besides the mould, the rooms were generally also dirty with stained toilet seat, hair and dirt in the in the bath tub, dust everywhere. It just feels like someone had a good idea with the hotel at some point, but it is not ran on a shoestring. We would have left on the first day, but there were no ferries at that hour so we left second day.

reviews.title: Terrible place
reviews.text: I don’t consider this a resort as much as a glorified, ridiculously expensive motel. You get 2 small bottles of water in your room and that is all. If you want more drinking water at this “resort”, you have to order from room service and pay a 20% service charge plus tax. And bottled water is so cheap in Vietnam. There is no store of any kind to purchase drinks or snacks (which is standard at actual resorts, along with a pharmacy), but not here, you have to order room service and pay the charge and tax, and there is no pharmacy. They want the equivalent of $2.50 to wash and dry a single t-shirt, so I’ll just let you imagine how much a full load of laundry would be. The room service food and buffets are terrible. Any restaurant in town has better food. We didn’t use the pools because of all the kids, no way I’m getting in those pee pools. The ocean at the private beach is brown and looks disgusting. There were six elevators in our building and you always stop on almost every floor, every time you ride them. The toilets don’t flush well at all. There was a cooktop stove with 2 burners in our room, but absolutely no cookware, plates, bowls or silverware of any kind (so what’s the point).  That’s kind of how we feel about this place, what’s the point. You get better service and amenities at most 2 star hotels

reviews.title: Extremely Disappointing – Definitely Not Worth the Price
reviews.positives: Good seaview
reviews.negatives:
I booked this hotel expecting a true 5-star experience, paying over 4 million VND per night, but everything fell far below expectations. The staff and security were unprofessional and unhelpful. The hotel was overcrowded with impolite guests, and the environment was noisy and dirty. I suspect they sold cheap deals to large local groups, completely ruining the atmosphere. Facilities like the restaurant, bar, and parking were poorly managed. I can't list all the issues, but overall, this was one of my worst hotel experiences.
Do not waste your money here. Avoid at all costs.

reviews.title: Bad experience
reviews.text:
-Hotel is understaffed, some staff are rude and do not do job.
-Leaves in pool, Food and drinks in pool area from the evening before and stuff just chatting.
-Paid for nice central view however view is obstructed with alot of leaves and trees
-Bath room floods everything anyone takes a shower
-Light in room automatic turns on every time I move my legs in the room.
-Tv automatically turns on at 6am everymorning.
-Shuttle bus into town should be a free service for premium hotel however. We need to pay everytime also under staffed so have to wait for long time for shuttle car.
-pool bars always closed 

Buffet was ok
Resturant was good.

reviews.title: False advertising
reviews.positives: The beach bar played some good music, bed comfy
reviews.negatives: Overpriced, mold in the room, shower flooded everything, not clean, noise from construction, noise from club downstairs, half the resort is closed you should inform people of that prior to booking, beach covered in glass and rubbish, incompetent staff, does not match pictures at all they are renderings

reviews.title: Overpriced place and far away from market
reviews.text: One of the famous place in Vietnam but still facilities were not up to the mark.. no water refil and charging different price for water in same hotel.. Housekeepers having all the room keys so they entered the room without our permission and in our absence which is not good.. they can do whatever in the room or take anything.. we have complained this to management but no action taken... Due to typhoon most of facilities are closed but they charged us full price which is not so much professional.. you need to charge as per services.

reviews.title: Terrible Stay at Flamingo
reviews.positives: The view from the resort was the only thing good about the hotel.
reviews.negatives: It felt crowded and dirty. The crowd was rude and pushy. For the amount we paid, we could have stayed at an actual luxury resort. We stayed in building 2 and there was no outdoor pool and we were not told about that beforehand. The service was not helpful and everything seemed like it was broken. Our AC barely worked. The bathroom had black marks all around the sink and shower grout. The food at the hotel was mediocre and expensive.

reviews.title: Stayed 4 nights at Flamingo
reviews.text:
Look  to be completely honest ever since we checked it hasn’t been the greatest experience for us here. Our room cards didn’t work, so we had to get them fixed yesterday. There are kids running around everywhere screaming and shouting so loud all day and into the night. In fact, there were kids screaming and running up and down the hallways late last night while we were trying to sleep.
There were people smoking in the hallways and in their room. This caused a horrific smell to permeate thru our room, there are cigarettes still left at the elevator which were lit. We asked to change rooms due to the extremely loud noise from the beach and children, the staff did move us to another room which was nice however the room we moved into had a broken air conditioner so the staff gave us a standing fan. The lights in the room were also broken which meant we couldn’t turn the lights off at night so we could sleep… this is meant to be a 5 star hotel! 
Just to top it off the buffet is a joke, the food was disgusting and dirty, there was hair all through our food and there are not enough tables and chairs for people to sit. We just stood around with a plate full of breakfast for 15 minutes waiting for a table while our food went cold.

There is no way this is a 5 star hotel, not even a 3 star. The only good thing about this place is the view. The view it’s very beautiful however, you can find other places with the same view, better quality and more relaxing. We have read the reviews prior before coming and saw people had the exact same experience here. This has made me think the reviews which were “good” are fake and not written by people who actually have stayed here. Please I beg you if you’re thinking of staying here DON’T. You’ll regret it, especially for the amount you’re paying.

reviews.title: My entire family or 8 had a terrible stay due to a poorly run resort.
reviews.positives: The View was very nice. Great photo opportunities from the bridges and balcony. I really enjoyed my family, which made up for the terrible resort experience.
reviews.negatives: Chaotic check-in process, denied buffet entry after waiting an hour due to staff miscommunication, then sent walking across the resort with hungry kids. One suite was dirty with black mold, two towels for six guests, clogged shower, thermostat locked at freezing despite four technician visits, and a microwave that lit up but didn’t heat anything. Room safe wasn’t even bolted down. Breakfast was a disaster: terrible coffee, utensils and cups were scarce, food was rushed and undercooked. Trash on the beach, cigarette smoke in hallways despite a posted policy. At checkout, they said they wanted to check the room in case we left something — but it was clearly to make sure we hadn’t stolen anything. Staff was friendly but overwhelmed. Resort is all style, no substance.

reviews.title: Hell No!!!
reviews.text: Don't even try! Urine smell in the hall way, fermented food smell in both 2 of our rooms. Rooms changing not available! Breakfast was even worst. You had to be up there in the first 15 mins from the opening, after that the food was all messed up and the place was all swamped up by seas of people. People like us, either cut short their vacation or lined up to return their keys early in the next morning. This place is for locals only. It's totally wasted..

reviews.title: Could not wait to get out of this hotel
reviews.positives: The location and the staff. Beautiful hotel
reviews.negatives: The noise level is out of this world.  Team building exercise you can hear the bullhorns all the way to the 16th floor.  Partys at night for company members same thing no where to just relax

reviews.title: Not what I expected.
reviews.text:
This was supposed to be our big splurge at the end of an 18 day trip through Vietnam. We made a mistake. To be fair, we did arrive the day after a massive national holiday where they were very busy, but by the time we arrived, everyone was checking out. During our stay, it was like a ghost town.

ROOMS: One of the more spacious rooms I've had in Vietnam, however, the floors were filthy with some kind of brown/blood looking stain on the floor along with other places that indicated the floors were given no attention between the room change. 
The bathrooms have freestanding tub, which looks really cool, but the shower head is positioned in the ceiling at the end of the tub and unless you are sitting in the bathtub while showering, water sprays literally EVERYWHERE. The bathroom is absolutely soaked after a shower. There was ONE hook to hang towels. It was on the back of the bathroom door. Other than that, there was no where to hang a wet towel, or anything wet, like a bathing suit.
Our room had some really cool lighting features including built in cubbies that had a coffee maker, another had sandals for the guests and a scale (I pulled out the scale to use it and discovered the batteries were so old, they had exploded inside and battery acid leaked all over my floor and hands). The cubbies were neat until it was time to go to bed, when we discovered there was NO WAY to turn off or even dim the lighting in the three cubbies. It was incredibly bright. I went to call downstairs for help, and discovered the in room phone was totally dead. I verified it was plugged into a power source, but it remained non-functional. Thankfully, I had the whatsapp number of the young man that checked me in, who confirmed that there was not a switch to control them. They sent a "tech" upstairs who proceeded to simply rip the light strip out of the cubby until they separated from their inaccessible power source. Problem solved? 
Our bed was comfortable enough, but we were not given a blanket of any sort when we first checked in. It was just a sheet. 

POOLS: gross. Just absolutely disgusting. I never stepped foot in any of them. They truly needed to be drained and refilled. I couldn't see the bottom, the water was so cloudy and green. There was a build up of algae along many areas of the pool (see photos). The only thing circulating the water was the weak waterfall feature. I assumed it would be taken care of by the next day with a massive dose of chemicals over night and some intense filtration and scrubbing. That did not happen. I complained to the agent at the front desk who was very contrite and apologetic and agreed that the state of the pools was unacceptable. He commented that it was VERY busy in the prior days and things had really gotten more dirty than usual. He promised it would be fixed and sent photos of the "lifeguards" scrubbing the algae. This became a common sequence of events. I complained about something, then suddenly everyone looked busy trying to make it better, but in reality, they did a very bad job. I shouldn't have to complain about a pool that is so filthy, it could make someone very sick. It's clear there isn't a specific process for water testing and pool hygiene, the lifeguards scrubbed the algae right back into the water, but in this case, a flocculant and a serious filtration of the entire contents of the pool were necessary. 
The next day I still could barely see the bottom, the water was green and murky, although there was slight improvement. It never improved more than that for the rest of the 4 days of our stay. My son developed a rash on his skin on the 2nd day there and from then out, I had to keep him out of the pool, which was extremely upsetting to him, because it is one of the reasons we booked this hotel. 

BEACH: the location and the beaches are one of the crowning jewels of this hotel. They are truly spectacular, especially since the other main beach in central town is completely inaccessible because they hav

reviews.title: Pretty location but the price is a bit high for the comfort
reviews.positives:
The view from the pool area is really beautiful. If you go around 7/8am, the pool was empty so it was nice to enjoy that. 

Most of the staff were really nice and helpful 

The selection of food at breakfast was huge, lots to choose from and whatever I ate I enjoyed.
reviews.negatives:
The pool was nice but it closed so early, 7pm! We booked the place for one night because of the pool and couldn’t go in. So that was frustrating. 

The shower in the bathroom is a tub with no curtain, so water went everywhere. 

The bed was very firm and uncomfortable. Also the duvet and pillows didn’t have any covers, so we had to call to get pillow cases which was not a huge deal but weird. 

The breakfast area is so busy, people were putting their hands in the food instead of using the tongs provided. Not the fault of the hotel but it made the morning a bit chaotic

reviews.title: Stay away
reviews.text: Run-down, bad service, bad attitude, too crowded and with the worst type of clientele. Reviews praising them are all seeders, scammers. Stay away.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Breakfast
reviews.negatives:
Everything was bad tv not working . Safe box not working 
Front desk never pick up the phone

reviews.title: Expensive but bad
reviews.text: The hotel is quite old. Its too crowded even during week days. Rooms and facilities are below average in term of high price. Staff is nice and supportive. Overall, not recommended at all!

reviews.title: Great Location, But Let Down by Dirty Rooms and Service
reviews.positives: Great location near restaurants. The pool is enjoyable, and the private beach is a highlight. The hotel is quite large, which adds to the overall comfort and space.
reviews.negatives:
I was disappointed with the room. I originally booked a room with a bathtub but paid for an upgrade to get a shower instead. Unfortunately, the room was not well cleaned. The first room I checked into had limescale in the sink and bathtub, and there were hairs left around the room.
The hotel is very large and often busy with groups and children, which can make it feel crowded. Communication at reception was difficult as the staff didn’t speak much English, so it was hard to explain the issues. I also found the staff not very friendly, they didn’t greet guests or say hello or goodbye, which made the service feel unwelcoming.

reviews.title: Staff and management needs to improve
reviews.text: The room view we one of it's kind and that's about it. The hotel has a lot of good ideas, such as having a sheet bridge connecting the three towers. However, the staff lacked proper training, most of them do not speak English, and there are a lot of queue jumpers and the staff didn't do anything about it. On the cleanliness side, the towels were torn, the pillow cases had stains, the bathroom toilet and the tub had stains, and the guests came out of the pools wet and went straight to the lifts so the floor was wet and sandy. Additionally, the girl only offers two bottles of 500ml water per person daily and the electric cars costs money. This is not what a five star hotel should be like. I was sad to leave the view but couldn't wait to leave the hotel.

reviews.title: Incredible place terrible atmosphere.
reviews.positives: Fantastic location and facilities
reviews.negatives: Loud circus like atmosphere. Corporate events with loud speakers. Loud annoying music all the time.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: When we need the support they asked me to contact Agoda but Agoda wasnt succesful to contact them for several times.

reviews.title: Bright and airy - in need of repair and staff training
reviews.positives: Spacious room with a comfy sofa. The shuttle facility could've been free, but was handy to get into town with the choice of restaurants was pretty good. I recommend booking the shuttle during happy hour to get one free, if it makes a difference to you. The fridge in the kitchenette area had a good size fridge and a good size freezer, which worked really well, and we really appreciated it. We were on the 16th floor with a room with a separate bedroom and lounge, and it had a lovely view over the pool and bay below... breakfast had a good selection of foods for varying taste, including salads, English breakfast items like bacon and sausages, Oriental choices and fresh fruit, which set you up for the day really well. The Four Seasons pool was well maintained, other than the steam room, which didn't work properly when we were there, and surprisingly charged for! If you paid for the Onsen pool, then you had a steam room and sauna in there which worked fine. The lifts were always clean and very responsive with a great system to make sure you were never waiting for very long for a lift to your chosen floor.. The manager, Mr BAK, was very responsive and made you feel that you have been listened to although the task in hand was bigger than he could handle during our stay...
reviews.negatives: The kitchenette was made non-functional, with the hot plates being removed, but leaving the pointless extractor in place, as well as a microwave that didn't work because "it was a safety hazard"! The staff were friendly but constantly on their phones, including the lifeguards, who should be looking out for their customers safety. The beach was dirty and Rocky, with lots of litter from some of the building work taking place on site. The staff spoke little to no English which made communication virtually impossible. One morning the chef came out on the floor of breakfast and picked his nose and flicked it on the floor… I just hope he washed his hands before preparing more food.!!! The pictures displayed were decades old, many from when the hotel was owned by a bigger hotel chain who sold it on I suspect once it became too expensive to maintain. The new owners have struggled to maintain the quality of the building, but it is not too bad for the area. the swimming pool was a little grubby, and also worn out in places where you could see the foundations of the pool which made it quite dangerous with bare feet underwater. The pool surrounding had broken and cracked wooden/plastic surfaces again not ideal for a swimming pool surround. The showers were maintained, and quite mossy which made it feel more slippery than it should be. We had use of the Onsen for a couple of times and the first time one of the pools was quite grubby in the men's area, but seem to have been cleaned after I complained, for the second visit which is nice and responsive. The spa was quite expensive for the Massage, and they ask you where you want focus, but did not follow the lead at any point during the Massage which was completely pointless asking where you wanted more focussed work...

reviews.title: Scammed
reviews.text: I have been scammed by Agoda not the hotel since I left hotel one day before my actually journey ends , Hotel staff was willing to pay money however Agoda denied it .

reviews.title: There are better places than this one
reviews.positives: The location in front of the sea is perfect
reviews.negatives: The staff was totally disorganized, chaotic and giving wrong information, food in restaurant very poor, generally this resort has potential, but the way how it’s taken care put it worse

reviews.title: Staff?
reviews.text: No way to contact anyone, joke of a customer care. Everyone has to add a 5* review at the checkout. Good luck :)
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Bogdan !

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us.

We are truly sorry to hear about your disappointment regarding customer support and your overall experience during check-out. Please allow us to clarify that guest reviews are always shared voluntarily, and we highly value honest feedback from every guest as it helps us improve our services.

We also regret that you experienced difficulties contacting our team during your stay. Your comments have been noted carefully and will be shared with the relevant departments to improve communication channels and guest assistance responsiveness.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused and hope to have another opportunity to provide you with a much more positive and seamless experience in the future.

Warm regards,

reviews.title: Rude staff and Overpriced. Much better options on Cat Ba.
reviews.positives: Location, nice room, comfy beds. Good breakfast.
reviews.negatives:
The staff at this place need to be trained way better. There were many instances of rude staff. And there should also be training in how to treat guests. This is a 5 star hotel, where they don’t even want to bring a coffee to your table.

The Air condition didn’t work the entire time and it got very warm in the room. The tv didn’t work at first but was fixed in an hour. Our mini fridge didn’t get cold so they had to come replace it.

Also we had a bus to catch within 15 minutes of checking out and they wanted us to sit down and wait for 10 minutes while they checked our room “for things we might have forgotten”… I have never been told to wait for 10 minutes when trying to check out and everyone knows the real reason is because they were thinking that we stole something.

They also force you to let them help you with your bags even though it is purely to make you feel like you need to tip. I don’t mind carrying my own bags and just wanted to get to my room faster but they literally would not let me carry my bags. Extremely weird behavior.

We ordered dinner at the restaurant in building 2 and it took over 1 hour for the food to come and nobody came and checked on us. We literally ordered two pasta dishes and there was a total of 3 tables in the restaurant including us! The food was also mediocre at best.

I’ve honestly received much better service at hostels!

I don’t know who is rating this 5 stars but I would give it 3 at the absolute most but for the price it is completely not worth it.

reviews.title: Not the best
reviews.text:
We stayed here for two nights and, to be honest, the experience was underwhelming. The rooms are spacious, but our bathroom had significant mould, and the entire apartment smelled damp and musty, it hits you immediately when you walk in. Several hotel facilities were also closed, including the “Lan Ha” rooftop restaurant, which I was hoping to book for my partner’s birthday. We weren’t informed of any closures before arriving, which was disappointing. Overall, the hotel lacks that five-star feel; it comes across as a bit cheap and tacky, and it’s in need of some refurbishing. On the positive side, the location is great, with a beautiful coastal walk that leads straight into town.

Cat Ba itself currently feels quite empty, almost like a ghost town. There’s a lot of construction happening, most of it nowhere near finished. I’m not sure why they’ve decided to build such a massive structure over what used to be the main beach, but it has definitely taken away from the charm of the area. I don’t think I’ll be returning anytime soon, maybe in 2–3 years once things have developed more.

Fingers crossed it doesn’t turn into what Halong Has turned into :(

reviews.title: Very noisy
reviews.positives: Awesome views and the amazing and varied breakfast.
reviews.negatives:
If you are looking for a peaceful and quiet stay, do not book here; at least do not pick the "Ocean View" rooms. There is a popular beach right below, and it's packed all day long, with the first people pouring from 6 am. Also, the hotel has a beach bar where very loud "music" is played non-stop until evening (I have to say though that this type of lounge bars on the beach with loud, noisy music seems to be common in most Cat Ba hotels). The rooms are definitely not soundproof. Mountain view rooms are likely to be less noisy.

Also, there are ants in the room, and quite a few stains on the walls.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: It started all on check in , the guy couldn’t find our reservation, than he found but said it’s only for 1 day not five . I asked how come you deducted than money for 5 days , silence, another 10 minutes later finally everything was settled. The room itself was nice size , but clearly a lack of good housekeeping, which confirmed the following days , since our room was never cleaned before 4 or 5 pm and in the morning no housekeeping on the floor even after 10:00am. Breakfast had a nice selection, but when the weekend came and the hotel started to fill , you found most to everything empty on the buffet and it took them ages to restock. I guess Managment is a big problem in this resort , because in 5 days I have not seen 1 manager in any department of the hotel! It is a pity this hotel is in a very nice location and it could be a top resort with the right management. Most employees were really nice ,but you could see that they stressed to the maximum.

reviews.title: If you are traveling alone, don’t stay here.
reviews.positives: Nice views
reviews.negatives:
The free rides in the open air cars were not available for me to use.  I asked the front desk multiple times about a ride in to town and they did not help.  Meanwhile, every family at the hotel was given a ride any time they wanted.  I dont mind walking but the same services should be a available to everyone.  
I would not recommend this hotel to a solo traveler.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Very disappointed with the room. The toilet didn’t work properly, the shower sprayed water everywhere, and there was a light that couldn’t be turned off because of a motion sensor — we had to sleep with the light on. We discovered all this late at night after returning from a tour. Totally unacceptable for a 5-star hotel.

reviews.title: Lovely place, INCREDIBLE VIEW, but don't go in the off season
reviews.positives:
Location was great (near Cat Ba town) and the access to the beach and the view spectactular.
Rooms were spacious and comfortable.
Lots of activities available (but they were all extra charge).
reviews.negatives:
Having to pay extra for activities like snooker/pool, fooseball, ping pong or with a volleyball in a posh hotel is a bit much. Fair enough on the VR/ arcade games and some water sports, but we should be able to borrow a volleyball or snorkle and mask.
The pool bar wasn't open (low season) so we couldn't have that "cocktails by the pool holiday" we had planned.
Staff did their jobs but weren't super friendly and didn't speak much english.

reviews.title: Sweet and sour
reviews.text:
This hotel is really a Sweet and sour deal. First things first, the hotel DOES NOT have all private beaches. The beach of the first tower is a public beach. You will see buses and buses of people coming all day to the beach. Anyone can come. Everyone can come. The beach of the second tower is somewhat private but anyone from outside can get into the hotel and go to the beach of the second tower. So in a way the hotel DOES NOT have a private beach. May be that is why they made so many swimming pools which also do not have any control. So technically speaking anyone can come and use the swimming pools too.

Then the staff at the reception are not really friendly. They did address our concerns and accommodated our requests, yes, but they always do it with a feeling that they are doing a favor for the customer, not because it is their responsibility. The rest of the staff throughout the rest of the hotel are really nice and friendly. It is just the reception staff, or some of the ones we interacted with, were really not friendly.

The food and anything else you want to buy in the hotel are extremely pricey. As if they are extorting. So you are better off buying things in the stores outside of the hotel. Many of the things you would need you can buy at the stores directly opposite the hotel.

Coming to the good things, the hotel seems to always be clean as you will see a lot of staff always cleaning the water and the sand away. The buffet restaurants are constantly cleaned and rearranged too. The rooms are nicely cleaned too. The swimming pools tend to be well maintained too but with so many people using them it is really not an easy task.

The hotel does offer extremely nice views. If you can splurge for ocean view rooms, do it. Otherwise there is really no merit in staying in this hotel. You cannot see the views if you are in any other rooms than ocean side. You can anyway access the beaches if you stay anywhere else. So there is really no reason for anyone to stay in this hotel.

Do try the drinks in the rooftop bar, they are good. The food in the restaurant there, not so much.

It is a good hotel for those looking to splurge some and enjoy the views and the feeling of a high end resort. But if you are not really there for the views and you are going to spend most of your time in the beach or the pool, then it is not worth it.

reviews.title: Nice hotel and location but lacking atmosphere and attentive service
reviews.positives: Location was great, comfortable clean rooms with good views. Buffet breakfast was excellent.
reviews.negatives:
We booked 3 bedroom and day before check in we were informed our room wasn't available due to maintenance issues. We were offered two smaller rooms which meant splitting the family. 
For the price of two nights we found better value for money and enjoyment staying at the smaller hotels in town at Cat Ba.

reviews.title: Weird place needs improvement
reviews.text:
Exceptional location on the beach with great view but the hotel was disappointing. 
Rooms were good, liked the balcony and the view. The infinity pool and the beach were great but I think they could make an effort to keep the beach clean. So much polystyrene! Kids club was run down and dirty, besides a huge VR games room (with no-one). The buffet or à la carte food was really average and always the same.  Staff were nice but often clueless, seems that no-one really told them what they should do. Many staff just seemed standing aimlessly. But they loved kids so that was nice! Generally, there is a lack of atmosphere, it’s huge with a lot of empty spaces. It’s a pity, could be great but was definitely a fail.

reviews.title: Beautiful facility but customer service subpar. Look for more reasonable accommodations.
reviews.positives: The facilities were beautiful. The room was extremely spacious and very clean. I liked the free use of the shuttle between the towers, and I liked the private beaches of each tower.
reviews.negatives: This is a long list of things that bothered me. Customer service was subpar. For a hotel at this price, you would expect exceptional service. When I checked in, I was able to check into the desk right away. However, my room was not ready, so they told me to come check in around 3 pm. I return to the lobby, and it's a madhouse around 3 pm. I didn't know which counter to check in, and there was no management telling me where to go. It didn't help that the guests cut in line and you need to be aggressive or else you would not get served, which I would think the customer service would see but they didn't even bother to address it. I had to wait an additional 30 minutes after checking in to receive my room key. The staff assisting me had to run back and forth between the check-in desk and key counter to find my reservation. That is not efficient, and many people were upset and waiting for their turn in line. That is simply unreasonable, especially for the price paid for this hotel. The staff does not greet you anywhere in the hotel unless you personally talk to them. Sanitization was also an issue, where I witnessed countless customers eating their food while in the buffet line with their hands, but staff not saying anything. I even witnessed a man use the communal utensils and ate directly from it when a piece of food was hanging off it. I was appalled by the buffets here and would not want to return. As for the pool, they were many guests in the hotel, but with poor management, any nonguest could access the facilities, pool, etc. and that is not fair to us paying customers. This hotel needs to do better if they expect a high price for their customers.

reviews.title: Poorly managed
reviews.text: I was asked 100x if I was part of the hotel. I was never asked if I needed water, drinks, food. They don't care if you are a guest. Employees not trained to serve, but to inspect.

reviews.title: Overall a great location and has huge potential to be an amazing resort but the service need to be improved.
reviews.positives: Great location and setting. Rooms were very nice.
reviews.negatives: Staff were not knowledge, did not inform us of full restaurant offer. Difficult to find your way around the hotel. Beaches were not cleaned. Unable to pay on card at pool bars.

reviews.title: Has so much promise but missed the mark
reviews.text:
Don't stay at the weekend..The hotel breakfast becomes a fight for most things and the noise is horrendous..The staff can not keep the food topped up quick enough or clear the tables..
Large tour groups arrive daily and lack of towels at the beach causes issues if you want to swim..
The hotel is far to big and this causes problems from  room cleaning to waiting for the lifts..If you like the personal touch this is not the hotel for you.
Wish we had given this hotel a miss

reviews.title: Beautiful spot , room, and view but not a great vibe.
reviews.positives: Beautiful room facing a beautiful view. The onsen  baths were very nice!
reviews.negatives:
LOUD music that played all day/ night from the 17th floor that came right into my room. I could not enjoy my balcony view that I paid for.  Rarely any  people on the 17th floor so no idea why they played the music so loudly. The property is HUGE! Too big actually and too big for the amount of staff.  It did not feel like 5 star treatment.  The sauna and steam room in the onsen were not hot. The restaurant is very open and bright. It’s More like a cafeteria. 
There are no quiet, chill , cozy spots to have a drink and enjoy the view.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text:
We were a group of three adults on vacation and decided to choose Flamingo Cat Ba. Since we wanted to stay together, I booked a Deluxe Twin room for three people. I carefully read the hotel’s options and saw that if the room was for 2 adults + 1 child sharing the bed, the price was about 2.6 million VND; if it was for 3 adults, then 3.8 million VND. That seemed reasonable, since 3 adults being 1.5 times the price of 2 adults made sense.

However, upon check-in, we were given a room with only two single beds. I went down to ask the receptionist and was told that if we wanted an extra bed, we had to pay an additional fee; otherwise, we would have to push the two beds together and the three of us sleep on them. I honestly don’t understand what the extra 1.5 times room rate was supposed to cover in this case. After that, I agreed to pay an extra fee for an additional bed. However, the Deluxe Twin room did not have enough space for an extra bed at all. Therefore, the staff suggested that I upgrade to a higher room rate for more space. This time I refused, and the hotel was forced to transfer us to a room large enough to arrange three single beds. However, the new room was not up to 5-star cleanliness standards, and the toilet was even clogged. Overall, it was truly not a good experience during our stay here.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel
reviews.positives: Great location and beautiful building
reviews.negatives: Staff were not very helpful

reviews.title: Island hotel Challenges
reviews.text: This hotel was massive in size, which unfortunately made it difficult to enjoy the amenities.  The swimming pool area and beach area did not have enough chairs for us. The pool and also the Onsen was not clean.  The hotel room was always "wet" with condensation, and we didn't want mesquitos so opening the windows was not an option.  The outside pool area had trash scattered that was not picked up and so it was dirty.  The Cat Ba town was good, excellent pizza place there.  Take the trolley if you have kids, the walk had obstacles - wires on sidewalk, & up hill.  We booked it for the beachfront property but no available chairs on the beach to enjoy. The coffee was luke warm, the paid espresso was not any better.  I would not recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Good value, great location
reviews.positives: The location is great with beach access. The rooms were a decent size and the breakfast was delicious with lots of variety.
reviews.negatives: The complex was massive, yet nearly empty (we arrived on a Wednesday), which gave it an abandoned, almost eerie vibe. The bathroom setup was strange—the shower was positioned directly over the bathtub with no curtain, so water sprayed everywhere.

reviews.title: Facilities not available
reviews.text:
The hotel is an impressive place, unfortunately the majority of advertised facilities aren't available. (cost-cutting).
The hotel is ran like a prison camp with areas blocked off, very strict procedures on uses of the limited facilities available. (gym only open set times, pools closed, bars and restaurants closed) 
The staff seem terrified of any breach of the authoritarian rules.
The hotel is photographed well and isn't as attractive as it looks. I guarantee you will be disappointed if you visit with high expectations.

reviews.title: Stressed
reviews.positives: Well, we stayed in the third building (which is not clearly stated while booking, the main building is the second), it has private beach (local and other guests outside can not access). Many pools are suitable for baby and parents. Lifeguard and spa is considered to be professional. The room is spacious, exactly the same with the picture. The balcony occupied with lots of plants. Buffet breakfast is so so
reviews.negatives:
The resort should be 4 stars. Many services and criteria do not meet 5 stars. We are managed to check in the room earlier (than the normal 3pm) but it’s serviced halfway, the floor, table and chairs are super dirty, my mother in law bed is not finished with the bedsheet folded messily. The bfast area is way too clouded, as well the the reception area, we did not have welcome drink and many booking information I got via phone did not match with at desk one. 

Room service was way too slow. I called to change the bedsheet in the morning but had not changed until night (after several calls)

In overall, the number of staff is under the service requirement, do not mention their professional service is definitely under 5 star hotel. 

I expect a more leisure and peaceful stay but am definitely disappointed.

reviews.title: Bad Customer Service
reviews.text:
This hotel is clearly geared more towards local guests as the way they treat their guess westerners would ever accept.

There are three separate buildings connected by a skybridge, and check-in is only available at the buildng your assigned too. It would have been helpful if they clarified this in advance, so I recommend emailing ahead to confirm where to check in.

Check-in is at 3 PM and checkout is at 11 AM. With so many people coming and going, the process is chaotic. It seems poorly managed—they could easily stagger check-in and checkout times to reduce congestion. We asked for a late checkout of just one hour (12 PM) and were told it would cost 30% of a full night’s stay, which felt unreasonable.

When we did check out, it was a mess. The checkout area was like a fish market—crowded, loud, and disorganised. People were sitting on the floor and lining up as if it were a busy buffet.

On the plus side, the hotel itself is nice. There’s a good pool and the beach is right at the doorstep. But the customer service leaves a lot to be desired. For example, we were travelling with an infant and needed extra bottled water to mix formula. Each room gets two complimentary bottles per day, but when we requested one more, they flatly refused. I was genuinely shocked—they denied a simple request over something that costs less than 10,000 VND (under $1). It left a poor impression and really impacted our overall experience.

reviews.title: memorable
reviews.positives: everything
reviews.negatives: the rooms are not soundproof and the people are so noisy. My baby kept on waking up with the noises outside

reviews.title: Would not recommend
reviews.text: My husband and I arrived at the hotel and the staff was kind enough to put us in a room early, as I wasn't feeling well. We did appreciate that. However, overall, we found the hotel to be very dusty and dirty (a lot of construction going on everywhere). We decided to eat at the hotel and the restaurant staff was very rude and not helpful. We were ignored and had to keep going out of our way to be seated, to order, to get a drink, etc. Our room was the worse part. The room wasn't that clean, the floors were NOT clean at all. I was walking barefoot and then washed my feet with a hand towel and it was black. There was no hot water and we had to wait for someone to come and fix it. The in-room safe didn't work and it had to be replaced twice until we got one that worked. At one point, the toilet stopped working and wouldn't flush, my husband fixed it as we didn't want to wait. Lastly, the other individuals staying on our floor were extremely rude and allowed their children to run the halls yelling and screaming and playing. Twice we had to ask them to please quiet down as I was trying to take a nap after a long day of travel. At night, the people in the room next to us were blaring their music and kept us awake. Unfortunately, we decided to check out early and only stayed the one night. When leaving the manager did try to offer us the chance to go to a new room, however, we were turned off by the entire experience and wanted to move on to our next location on our tour of Vietnam. We personally wouldn't recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Very kind staff. Comfortable bed and the water is beautiful.
reviews.positives: The bed was comfortable and the lobby was great. Also the rooftop bar is pretty.
reviews.negatives: The music from the rooftop was way too loud and I could hear it in my room.

reviews.title: Empty with questionable service
reviews.text: The hotel is very new and very large. It feels empty and understaffed. Granted we’re here in December which seems to be off season. Only one of the several restaurants is open and the service is terrible. That is, most of the western food is unavailable and the wait staff doesn’t even know. The hotel is beautiful though. I’ve been joking that some famous architect/builder must have sold it to some rich guy who doesn’t know how to run it.

reviews.title: Location is great. Hotel is too big!
reviews.positives: All the vegetation in the building is amazing. Staff service was excellent!
reviews.negatives: The bathtub is impossible to access for elderly people!!

reviews.title: On the brink of bankruptcy
reviews.text:
No one speak English. This resort probably made a lot of layoffs and hired non-english speaker locals to save costs. The best English I have heard during my stay is actually the cook, not the service staff. Also don't eat there, we tried 2 of their restaurants, all bad for high price! Go to the town!

If you don't mind bad quality of service, the place is otherwise quite beautiful, the place and environment, and swimming pools still are good.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Kelvin !

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback with us.

We sincerely regret to learn that your experience did not meet your expectations, particularly regarding communication with our staff and your dining experiences at our restaurants. Your comments concerning English communication skills and service quality are taken very seriously, as providing attentive and comfortable hospitality to our international guests remains one of our key priorities. We are continuously enhancing staff training programs to improve both communication and guest service standards.

We are also sorry to hear that the food quality and pricing did not provide the value you expected. Your feedback has been shared with our culinary and restaurant management teams for careful review and improvement.

At the same time, we truly appreciate your kind remarks about the beauty of the resort, surrounding environment, and swimming pools. We are pleased that these aspects of your stay lef

reviews.title: Relaxing and refreshing
reviews.positives: The staff is accommodating and place is relaxing and has a good ambiance.
reviews.negatives: The count down during New Year celebration is failed my expectation.

reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.text:
We spent 3 nights here. Half the things are closed. Only one restaurant open and not all the time. Dinner serving starts at 6.30pm (after my child is asleep). Only 2 pools open.  Beds are hard as rock. Walk to town or pay money to take the shuttle. Mountain view actually has the walkway bridge outside the window so people can look in your room. 
If you get a good deal it might be worth it, but don’t pay the luxury tax when it’s not.

reviews.title: Spacious rooms and amazing facilities
reviews.positives: Very spacious ocean view rooms.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast buffet quality was average. Much of the food was room temp

reviews.title: Overcrowded hotel
reviews.text: I do not know what happens during other months, but in June this hotel is horribly overcrowded. It is a hotel for Vietnamese families with children to come.  It is very loud and messy. During the night and very early morning people are shouting in corridors… during breakfast it is also not possible to find a place to sit and eat. The view is really beautiful, but it will be accompanied not by the sound of waves, but by the  annoying shouting everywhere. The most noisy hotel I have ever been…

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The View to the bay is the main attraction of the hotel and it's really is beautiful.
The room is spacious, clean, well maintained and thr facilities are great.
The Spa is beautifully designed and the treatments are in a good level and decent price.
reviews.negatives:
The food isn't in the same level of the rest of the hotel. Just not very good in my taste.
The stuff is very friendly and nice, but most of them don't speak English in a decent level.

reviews.title: The room was spacious and high impact but the bathroom was full of mould
reviews.text:
We stayed on the 16th floor and our room had ocean facing views which were breath taking! 

Unfortunately the bathroom is filled with mould and needs a deep clean. 

With regards to the facilities, the all seasons pool needs to be cleaned, but the outdoor pool was gorgeous and right on the beach! The outdoor pool is also a great spot for photos.

Many of the restaurants were closed, but this ended up being a good thing as the room service was outstanding and one of the best meals we had in Vietnam, you must try the Pho Bo!
reviews.response:
Dear valued guest,

Thank you for sharing your experience following your stay at Flamingo Cat Ba Resort.

We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the spacious room, breathtaking ocean views from the 16th floor, and the beautiful outdoor pool by the beach. It is also wonderful to know that you had such a positive dining experience with our room service, especially the Pho Bo. Your kind recommendation truly means a lot to us.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the cleanliness issues you encountered in the bathroom and at the all-seasons pool area. Please be assured that your comments regarding mould and maintenance have been shared with our housekeeping and engineering teams for immediate attention and improvement.

Thank you once again for your valuable feedback. We truly appreciate both your compliments and constructive comments, as they help us continue improving our facilities and services.

We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for an even better experience

reviews.title: Beautiful views at an amazing resort.
reviews.positives: Amazing beach front property with private pools, indoor and out, amazing views. Close enough to be able to walk to the town or they provide a shuttle for a fee. It gets hot. Great accommodations, spacious, lots to do for all ages. The local kind of food was best. Smoothies were delicious, pho was great, kids loved the macrons.
reviews.negatives: I lost some money at some point so that was disappointing.

reviews.title: Mixed feelings
reviews.text:
This was a very weird hotel. I arrived on Thursday, left on Sunday. Thursday and Friday the hotel was nearly deserted. It almost felt like I was the only one staying there. On Saturday and Sunday, the place is crazy busy. It seems like this venue is used by many Vietnamese families for a weekend-getaway. The restaurant, lobbys and beaches were all empty at first, but crazy busy during the weekend.

The room was nice and modern (sea-side view) though the terras was not useable (no chairs, 30cm width), The room had a bath with a shower on top, and indeed the water goes everywhere. It doesn't make any sense. It also took 40m to fill my bath (I timed it). The AC worked well, but there was a distinct moldy smell coming from it, so I couldn't put it on max.

When I arrived there were a bunch of dead cockroaches in the hallway, which were left there for at least 2 nights.

The infinity pool was closed and only opened during the weekend, and similarly for the long pool which was partly closed during my stay.

The hotel doesn't allow you to charge anything to your room (you have to put down a deposit) and they also check your room to check out. This is apparently done in some hotels in Vietnam, but in my 3 weeks of traveling I only had it here. It really does make you feel untrusted and unwelcome. + having to wait for them to check your room upon checkout can make you late for your pickup.

The staff that I've interacted with were nice though and the breakfast buffet was nice too.

If you can visit during the week and on a sale, this place is probably a visit. But it's definitely not a 5 star hotel and the price is way too expensive without discounts.
reviews.response: Dear Valued Guest, Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. While we are pleased to know you appreciated our location, we sincerely regret that several aspects of your stay did not meet expectations. We are truly sorry for the inconvenience caused by the room lighting setup, bathroom water leakage, balcony regulations, and the smoking situation during dinner. Your comments are valuable and have been shared with the relevant teams for immediate review and improvement. Guest comfort is always our priority, and we regret that we fell short during your visit. We appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again for a more comfortable and enjoyable experience in the future. Best regards, Hotel Management Team

reviews.title: Great beach and comfortable rooms
reviews.positives: Beach is pristine, room was spacious and comfortable, buffets were decent, the views were impeccable. Honestly, an overall pretty great stay.
reviews.negatives:
I’d like to shake the hand of the person who designed the room bathroom to formally congratulate them for coming up with the stupidest bathroom design in hotel history. It’s a tub with no door or shower curtain, so water goes everywhere on the bathroom floor. But the floor surface is flat so the water doesn’t drain, turning your bathroom into a swimming pool, which is strange considering the numerous pools already available on the property.

One other note, the hotel finds a way to charge you a small fee for pretty much everything, and makes using the property credit vouchers difficult. Sort of defeats the purpose of having vouchers if there’s so many conditions for using them (somehow we couldn’t redeem the full value at dinner even though we paid full price, staff couldn’t explain why).

I don’t want to detract from the hotel stay itself because the location and property were very nice, but a few strange things were quite irksome.

reviews.title: Not worth it for value
reviews.text: The staff wasn’t very professional. They called our room at 10pm waking us up to tell us we didn’t pay. When we went to front desk the following morning they told us that we had paid? Which we did. The outdoor pool wasn’t great and the prices were pretty outrageous compared to other resorts in veitnam. Save the money and stay somewhere else

reviews.title: Great experience overall
reviews.positives: Location, view excellent. Close to town, easy buggy ride from hotel and back. Large complex with many things to do.
reviews.negatives: Swimming pool needs some repair especially the bottom and not easy to get into for older people due to its layout. No bar or food facilities at the pool while we were there.

reviews.title: Over priced food, slow service
reviews.text:
The views from the bars, beach and restaurant are great, and the staff are very lovey until you need any help.

The food, although plentiful, was really bellow par and over priced. Most other places in Cat ba served delicious phó and other local dishes. Flamingo gives quantity but lack any flavour, if you stay here, rent a bike or walk to town for every meal.

The booking shows stunning views from the room, the reality is, if you are in the central building, most of the rooms saying ocean view mean you get to see half the ocean, half into someone else’s room, (and they see you). 

We booked a room with the title, “deluxe ocean central view”,  when we asked for a room change it took 2 days to sort out. The manager promised to fix this for us on day 2 after a heated debate, he said he  would call or message us at 1:30 but didn’t get back to us until after I prompted him later in the evening.

There was no further apology or compensation for their mistake.

Overall, it’s nice. But over priced. They say it’s a 5 star hotel, but the customer service at management level is second rate as is the food. The rest of the staff are very polite and warm.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Beautiful Location, Pools, Staff, Beach
reviews.negatives: Transportation to town expensive for solo travelers, but walkable… solo travelers should be in Tower 2 or 3!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
Do not go here if you want to relax.  The hotel has nice pools and sights but is often packed, making it noisy and busy. Most staff do not speak English and the restaurants are terrible and western priced. 
I received my food first whilst my partner waited and only after I finished recieved his. He ordered chicken which was raw and sent it back. After complaining to management they did nothing about it.
You will also have to pay for most services like life jackets for swimming and getting a shuttle bus into town which other resorts tend to offer complimentary.

reviews.title: Yes for families but not for couples
reviews.positives: It’s a really big hotel with an amazing view and great facilities.
reviews.negatives: It’s like the Vietnamese club med.. a lottt of families with a lot of children that just take up the entire space so you can’t get a moment of quite (it was even noisy in the room). Also the stuff barely speaks English which is expected for the price of the hotel.. the beaches and pools were packed and honestly it was a bit much.. wouldn’t recommend for people who want a quiet relaxing vacation.

reviews.title: Very disappointing stay
reviews.text:
Come from Australia
To start with the pool smelt of urine and dirty body odor with parents allowing there children to be naked swimming not hygienic for others swimming, the buffet for dinner was over priced and mainly seafood when we asked if there was other opinions other the seafood and they said there was but plain rice doesn’t count, and the other patrons had there children behind our table outside while we tried to eat out dinner spewing right behind us and then the parents decided to proceed to pull the pants down of there children and get them to try and urinate in a flower pot directly next to us while we still are trying to eat after they spewed behind us

reviews.title: Quite good
reviews.positives: Cayak and private beach
reviews.negatives: Car park far

reviews.title: Overpriced resort
reviews.text: Have good rooms and facilities but a little overpriced. Food was good overall. We asked for a ocean view but got a partial ocean view and partially viewing other room. Once we opened the curtains the people standing in other room balcony can easily see our room. So we had to keep curtain closed most of the time. For the price paid we expected to view the ocean all the time with privacy.

reviews.title: The hotel was lovely and quiet.
reviews.positives:
Thuy at reception was very helpful.  
The onsen was lovely.   The staff at the pool and onsen were very polite.   The cost of the onsen was nit included in our rate as it was for friends who booked thru hotels.com.   
The hotel was very quiet, very few guests so that was lovely!   We did not eat there, breakfast seemed quite pricey. 
We appreciated the upgrade to the room.  
The beach was lovely.
reviews.negatives: The pools were inconsistent in temp, warm one day and cold the next.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Even though this is a stunning hotel with lovely beach and pool in the middle of pure nature and breathtaking views it has it’s inconveniences. The top floor bar is sensational, but always empty and quiet. The bridge and balcony is fantastic and offers the best views. The gardeners must have their hands full. There are plenty of loungers and the hotel is clean and safe. There is no on site grocery shop.
Things to look out for:

1. No food in the room policy, it is unclear what are you able to consume in the room. The reception told us, no smelly food is allowed, which can be understandable, but on the rules sheet you receive upon arrival it says : it is recommended to only eat in their restaurant to avoid any dietary problems or food poisoning. But they only have 1 restaurant available for dinner, overpriced and very quiet with 0 atmosphere with bunch of waiters just hoping to serve someone. It is so much better and cheaper to eat outside. Food wasn’t great about 4 out of 10. The buffet breakfast however was great, with a lot to offer.
2. Shuttle service. This only takes you to bottom part of the hotels and it is often too busy to be available.
3. Miscommunications. We asked if they could call cable car company to see if they are definitely running on particular day, in order not to miss our flight. One person told us they were closed and one that they were open. Frustrating. Only handful of staff speak english.
4. You are not allowed to dry your clothes on the balcony. After you swim 3x a day there is only one little drying stand you can use inside the room and obviously it takes forever to dry your clothes especially when advised not to open your balcony due to insects.
5. Kids club- haha. You have to pay for everything. There is a play area for small kids which is free but otherwise you have to purchase pricey tokens for everything else and most of it doesn’t work or is switched off.
6. Complimentary foot soak. 15 minutes of sitting with your feet in a bucket of hot water.😆 just weird.
7. Indoor pool was good, but a bit dated and dirty, you could see brown lines from water everywhere. Sauna was good and so was the gym.

Overall good hotel just needs to improve to charge premium.
reviews.response:
Dear valued guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed review of your stay at Flamingo Cat Ba Resort.

We are delighted to know that you enjoyed many aspects of the resort, especially the stunning natural surroundings, breathtaking views, beach, pools, rooftop bar, cleanliness, safety, gym, sauna, and our breakfast buffet. Your appreciation for the beauty and atmosphere of the resort means a great deal to us.

At the same time, we sincerely appreciate your constructive feedback regarding several areas that did not fully meet your expectations. We regret any inconvenience caused by the room food policy, shuttle service availability, communication inconsistencies, balcony drying restrictions, Kids Club experience, and certain facility maintenance concerns. Your comments have been shared with the relevant departments for careful review and improvement.

We also understand your concerns regarding restaurant atmosphere and pricing. Guest feedback like yours is extremely

reviews.title: Magical place to stay! Highly recommend if you want to explore the Ha Long Bay islands, much quieter
reviews.positives: Absolutely beautiful! Rooms were comfortable, elegant, spacious, with thoughtful touches! Loved the room prep and treats to celebrate our anniversary! Very tranquil. Beautiful beach and location.
reviews.negatives: Hotel was pretty empty. It would have been great to have been positioned on the ocean view; it would definitely have improved the rating, especially since they were empty. Restaurant, bar, etc. were empty; we didn't do the breakfast option as it was overpriced.

reviews.title: Honest review
reviews.text:
I really wanted to love this place. 
The view was spectacular and the buffet breakfast was great. 

Unfortunately, our group felt like the resort was a huge money grab. The hallway echo's a lot and so its quite noisy at night. And a lot of the facilities were either not working or cost extra. I wouldn't stay again.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your honest feedback with us.

We are truly pleased to hear that you enjoyed the spectacular views and our buffet breakfast. However, we sincerely regret that other aspects of your stay did not meet your expectations.

Your comments regarding the hallway noise and the inconvenience caused by facilities being unavailable or incurring additional charges are taken very seriously. We understand how these factors can impact the overall guest experience, and we are currently reviewing these concerns with the relevant departments to improve both comfort and transparency.

At our resort, we strive to provide a balanced and worthwhile experience for all our guests, and we regret that we fell short during your stay. Your feedback is invaluable in helping us identify areas for improvement.

We truly appreciate your candid review and hope you might consider giving us another opportunity in the future.

Warm regards,
Hotel Management

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.positives: The room was nice, large and comfortable, and well decorated. The breakfast was very good and the spa is beautiful.

reviews.title: Not as expected
reviews.text:
To be honest, we had higher expectations for this hotel.
Luckily, the room shown in the photos was the room we were given. We stayed in building 2 in the Premier Ocean King room. The bed was huge, the balcony was large and you could sit and enjoy the beautiful view.
In addition to the various free drinks, bathrobes and slippers (too small for Europeans) were also provided.
The bathroom had a bathtub (no shower) and toothbrushes, toothpaste and other hygiene products were provided. 
Unfortunately, the toilet seat was yellowed and the sink was damaged by limescale, which made it seem dirty.
We had to ask the cleaning girls every day to clean the room and provide us with clean towels (which were sometimes dirty and stained). 

As for the breakfast: the choice was very big. There were so many varieties of food. However, you have to keep in mind that after 8 am the canteen gets very crowded and sometimes it is difficult to find a table.
Not to mention the fact that there are many families with children wandering around. 

The swimming pools were very nice but there is little maintenance.
In the 4 days we were there, there were always leaves in the pools (especially the infinity pool in building 1).

The elevators are very busy and sometimes you have to wait up to 5 minutes for an elevator.

The staff is not very attentive and sometimes the people behind the reception do not speak English.

I think the hotel has lost a bit of authenticity over time and honestly I do not think a place like this is suitable for children.

reviews.title: was good, disappointing food at the hotel and amazing landscapes!
reviews.positives: beautiful landscapes and amazing location
reviews.negatives: breakfast buffet is good, but a la cart menu is really bad - probably one of the worst restaurants I have been to

reviews.title: Not a 5 star hotel
reviews.text: Only one building out of 3 are operating so it has an abandoned feeling.  We paid for an ocean front room with a balcony.  But the way it was designed, the view was obstructed and there were a lot of mosquitoes for us to use the balcony.  They use an extremely strong smelling oil for room freshener that gave me a headache.  We had to unplug it and moved it out to the balcony.  Wi-Fi was bad especially at night.  Breakfast was good with a lot of selections.  Very nice indoor pool.  Couldn’t swim at the beach as the water was cold and kind of muddy.
reviews.response:
Here’s a professional, well-balanced response you can use to reply to this review:

---

Your comments about the obstructed view and the mosquito inconvenience on the balcony are well noted, and we understand how this could impact your comfort.

We also apologize for the discomfort caused by the room fragrance. This is certainly not the experience we aim to provide, and we appreciate you bringing it to our attention so we can review the type and intensity of scent used in our rooms. Additionally, we are sorry for the Wi-Fi performance, especially during peak hours, and our team is currently working on improvements to ensure a more stable connection.

Regarding the current operation status of the buil

reviews.title: One of the best properties
reviews.positives: The location is amazing. The facilities are very good. The staff is courteous.
reviews.negatives: The buggy service to the market is chargeable. The food options for vegetarians.

reviews.title: Interesting and surreal
reviews.text:
Stayed two nights Nov 2025. Resort itself is huge and large parts of it are either unfinished or totally empty, which gave it a strange vibe— sort of an uneasy depressing and confusing one. Why have none of the buildings been completed after 16 years of construction? Why is most of the building empty? Why is the pool not clean? What do the employees do all day? It seems many are standing at their stations with little to keep them occupied. The hotel has lots of amenities: an onsen, a spa, an arcade, a karaoke bar, a beach, and outdoor pool, gym…most are stark and soulless. It seems like someone designed the place after having seen photos of resorts in other places without ever actually having been in a resort before. Rooms are spacious and nice views, but design is strange. No way to turn off lights by bedside without getting out of bed to do so. Outlet over 1.5 meters from bedside (bring a long charging cable for your phone). Lights in hallway don’t turn off at all unless one removes the key card from the electric panel, which shuts down electricity in entire room, so you must choose between having air conditioning or trying to sleep with lights on. Shower sprays all over bathroom and there is no shower curtain. TV has many international channels. Restaurant has excellent incredible breakfast but dinner and lunch menu odd. Chicken cartilage and chicken feet and pork cartilage but no apparent regular meat. Only one restaurant on premises open while we were there. 
Cat Ba itself is one huge construction site, as far as we could tell. The national park is wild but there are very messy parts filled with trash and Cat Ba town is literally one huge hotel complex being built after another. Why build so many when this one isn’t even complete and totally unfilled? Who will come to the new constructions? How does the island expect to maintain a UNESCO status as a bio diverse area if they are building all these hotels?
Overall hotel is clean and acceptable, front desk staff nice, very responsive. But it is overbuilt, too large, imposing and at the same time in need of maintenance.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your review and for sharing your honest impressions. We’re glad you enjoyed the spacious room, beautiful views, and our helpful front desk team.

Your feedback has been passed to our management team to improve facility maintenance, service quality, and guest comfort.

We truly appreciate your comments and hope we can welcome you back for a better experience in the future.

Warm regards,

reviews.title: Okay. You shouldn't experience it during the peak tourist season.
reviews.text:
- I rented 2 rooms here, my family has 5 members. The receptionist helped me arrange for the 2 rooms to be close to each other. 
I think it's better to go in the low season, because going during peak times like my family did is not very recommended as prices are higher and the quality doesn't improve much.
- Pros:
Nice staff, very helpful
Free electric shuttle around the 3 buildings is convenient 
Beautiful view, has a swimming beach and a nice pool 
Pleasant smell in the room 
Quite close to the center, convenient for dining and entertainment 
Buffet restaurant with a variety of dishes, not too outstanding but flavorful enough 
- Cons:
Not the hotel's fault, but during peak tourist season, many guests from various places come, and their awareness is poor, making the environment and culture in the hotel uncomfortable.
Prices during peak season are high compared to the quality of service provided.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Check-in was seamless and we booked a twin instead of a double and that was taken care of quickly. The room was on a high floor and the sea view was spectacular.
A good selection for breakfast but poached eggs were not available, and the cook didn't speak English - you had to point at either fried or an omelette. Lots of unsupervised kids sometimes spilling food on the floor.  You have to show both room keys which were swiped I guess to prevent people going in twice once early and then late. 
It was a Saturday night and pretty full with Vietnamese weekend trippers from Hanoi.
There was a nice walk along the cliff which was well maintained.
Electric cars were available to take you to town which was also walkable.
We didn't eat in the hotel.

reviews.negatives: The only downside was that some parts of the day there wasn’t very hot water and when you did shower the water got all over the bathroom.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
On the plus side, the view from our Deluxe Ocean room was better than any I've experienced and the Onsen spa and VR games room were included in our room and were super fun.  We booked a couples massage which was also incredible and very reasonable.

On the downside, the staff have clearly not been trained very well.     The English level is very poor everywhere in the hotel (though Google translate did the trick), and the cleanliness was not what it should be.  There were dirty marks on our bedroom window, curtains curtains and towels and there was a surprisingly  disinterested response when I complained that the  pate which was advertised as crab actually contained pork (obviously not great for pescatarians and 2 of the 3 major religions) and the pate was not even taken off our bill despite us not being able to eat it, but overall the location and value for money offset those issues.

reviews.negatives: I'm not sure why people give poor ratings. Also re the beach: it was often clean, but some garbage would wash up and be visible with low tide. Just depends on tide really.

reviews.title: Renovating after the storm, still an excellent place to stay while visiting.
reviews.positives:
Cat Ba Flamingo was an excellent place to stay. We stayed in the building with the infinity pool overlooking the ocean. The rooms were comfortable and spacious, the amenities were exactly what we needed, and we enjoyed the location in general. 
We were visiting right after a major typhoon had hit Cat Ba so some of the amenities were unavailable like the bridge and some of the pools. Flamingo Cat Ba communicated this early and let us know what to expect for amenities which was appreciated.
reviews.negatives:
If you stay in the next month or two, expect construction sounds all day. Anytime we were in the room we could hear loud drilling or banging between 7am - 6pm. 

As well, the location was a bit farther from town than I expected. The buggys will park out front to take you to town but expect them to price gouge if you leave from Flamingo. While we were there it was 10.000/person VND from town to anywhere but if we started from Flamingo they would charge 20.000/person VND.

reviews.title: Good, can be improved
reviews.text:
It was challenging to reach there. It's located on the Cat Ba island, which requires you to take a ferry, followed by a 30 min road travel. We were not aware of the specifics and it was not communicated by the hotel, that the last ferry leaves at 6:30 pm. We took a taxi from Hanoi, which reached the Ferry point at 8:30 pm. Then Uyen from the hotel's central team helped us get a speed boat and sent a taxi from the other side to pick us up. We ended up paying way more to the Hanoi taxi + speed boat + 30 min taxi on the island.
The best and pretty much the only reason to book this hotel is the fantastic beach, with all the beachside facilities like sun bed, bar, towels, shower, etc!
If you're a vegetarian or vegan, then there's pretty much just a few options so if you're staying longer food becomes a problem. They are open to customizing a few dishes, but the language barrier creates a lot of friction.

reviews.title: Awesome view
reviews.text: The resort is exceptionally beautiful, and our experience was quite pleasant. However, I encountered two issues. For the first two days, I resided in the premier oceanfront 1 BHK, and on the final day, I stayed in a deluxe oceanfront 1 BHK. I discovered that the room size and the view from the deluxe accommodation were significantly superior to those of the premier option. The premier room was located far from the beach view, and the view itself was only partial. Additionally, for the first time in my travel history, I came across a 5-star hotel that did not provide body lotion among the toiletries.

I used the Onsen which was wonderful, and I also had a massage which was again amazing. Would highly recommend this. If you’re going to be in that area on the island of Cat Ba don’t hesitate to stay at this resort, you will love it.
reviews.negatives: I honestly loved everything! My only issue was the fact that most of the staff did not speak English, so communicating was a bit of an issue. However, there was always somebody available to help translate so really not an issue.

The bathrooms in both have no shower curtains or way to contain the water so if your looking for a public pool shower esk vibe this is your hotel. The breakfast was really good. The location was pretty good.

Ohh this was the best hotel in our vietnam stay, it’s a very nice resort, with the best staff, they literally did everything for us, they booked us a cruise cheaper than doing it outside, we wanted to rent biked and they contacted a bike shop and got us the bikes, the bikes were same price as outside too 150k VND, the views are amazing, we had the ocean view and it was awesome!

reviews.title: Beautiful view
reviews.text:
We really loved the view from our room. The beach was very clean and the pool was beautiful and a great temperature. We liked that you could rent a buggy to take you to and from the town center. The breakfast had lots of options. 

We were disappointed with the lunch and dinner options. You could not order food by the pool. When we went to one of the restaurants, they didn't have many of the things we tried to order from the menu as they said they were sold out. We were also disappointed that most days we were there, there were no clean towels by the pool for us to use. The first night they put us in the wrong room. We were supposed to have a one bedroom, but instead they put us in the studio, which was disappointing as we wanted a separate room for our child. 

This resort has the potential to be a five star resort, if they improve their food options and service.

reviews.title: Excellent
