reviews.title: Excellent place to unwind and enjoy Cat Ba's natural beauty
reviews.positives:
This was hands down the best choice for a resort that I have made yet! From starting off the check in was smooth and we were quickly escorted to our rooms which are very well designed! The rooms doors and furniture are extremely solid and high quality and the room we chose came with a huge standalone tub. The 2 beaches are extremely beautiful and surrounded by tall cliffs which gives the resort a private remote feel that I love. Miss Quyen messaged us on whatsapp after checking in giving us an easy convenient way to request amentities such as renting a motor scooter to explore the island which I highly recommend as there are caves, bunkers and well maintained roads through the untouched jungle to experience.  While we were there the resort is going through upgrades or maintenance which for our stay just meant that we had to walk along the bridge to building 1 for the restaurant which has delicious Margherita pizza since the 17th floor restaurant was closed in our building. The upgrades seem to be managed quite well as we never had any disturbances or noise during our stay. The Onsen is definitely worth doing they have a sauna and steam rooms and several mineral pools with various features in it! The breakfast is in the 2nd building on the 6th floor and is excellent with a wide variety of options including fresh omelets, cappucinos, fresh fruit, cheeses and much more. 

I recommend booking the cat ba express to get to and from the resort from Hanoi as it was seemless and dropped us off right at the lobby with clear communication. The resort may also offer options but this is what we used and it was easy.
reviews.negatives: The fire pits are located a bit too close to the restaurant in building 1 and i would recommend moving that feature or replacing with a propane option due to the wind blowing smoke into the restaurant.

reviews.title: A little room for improvement,  but overall very good.
reviews.text: Had to change rooms, due to a the balcony door wouldn't lock.  I think it should of been delt with more swiftly, avoiding a room change at 10.30 at night.  I reported it alot earlier and knew myself it wasn't as easy fix.  Best solution move.  Couple of other small issues,  but we would come back.

reviews.title: Quyen was very helpful, she is the best, although the skinny tall guy in the front desk wasn’t very helpful, he question

We loved the sauna and steam room. The sky bar was amazing and the restaurant was absolutely delicious. The staff is super helpful and polite. Went out of their way in every instance.
reviews.negatives: I can’t really think of anything. We were here in low season, so there were not that many guests which I guess could be viewed as a negative as it seemed a bit empty sometimes, but we didn’t mind at all!

reviews.title: Lovely hotel with great views but not on the weekend
reviews.text:
We booked the 2 bedroom premier ocean view at the Grand Cat Ba (which seemed to have the best view and slightly more spacious rooms.) The view was stunning , the room ,especially the living area, was really spacious and the hotel was lovely when it was quiet. Unfortunately we arrived on a Sat, which is to be avoided at all costs. We waited 3 hours for the ferry with our car as we had big bags with us and when we arrived at the hotel it could only be described as a bun fight at check in. This is a popular 1000 room resort so it is VERY busy with locals from Hanoi on the weekend. Breakfast was huge but again, very busy. SkyBar view was amazing but food was not great and very overpriced.  The hotel also seems to have some issues with staffing so all of the pool bars were closed, English was not widely spoken and many of the  staff were not from
The local area so we’re not able to offer
Local advice., but everyone was very pleasant and tried to be helpful. There was also construction in building 2 common area which is ongoing until May. We did have an idyllic Tuesday morning though when many had left and we had the resort to ourselves.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Great place to recharge for a few days, mainly because of the amazing location and huge amount of facilities. All for a very decent price. We decided to extend our stay with a night - would for sure recommend! 

Main things that made our stay were: 
- Great location, in a private bay with two private sand beaches and a nice cliffwalk connecting it to a third beach. Especially with all the construction going on in Cat Ba town, its a very nice and quiet place (dec'24)
- Overall aesthetic of the hotel is great, integrating the multiple buildings into the bay with its colors, plants, pools and walkways. 
- Room with seaview 
- Great Onsen & Spa facilities 
- The hotel and facilities were not crowded at all, at some times the hotel even felt pretty empty

reviews.title: Chouette expérience
reviews.text: Nous avons passé quelques jours très agréables. Les enfants ont beaucoup apprécié la piscine et la plage. Le personnel est très attentif à nos besoins.

reviews.title: Lovely stay, despite construction work for the typhoon
reviews.positives:
Loved the location, the room, the breakfast and the beach. Good value for money.
The boat tour suggested by the hotel was also great.
reviews.negatives:
The staff doesn’t speak great English (like in many parts of Vietnam), but you have WiFi access everywhere and can use google translate.
The hotel is being reformed after the typhoon, but we knew it beforehand and it didn’t affect us.

reviews.title: Picturesque
reviews.text:
This is an amazing resort with lots of things to keep you and the kids entertained . The rooms were clean, very spacious and everything worked as it should except the microwave which was just for display purposes only. The best part of the room was waking up to a beautiful sunrise over Lan Ha bay. The buffet breakfast had a huge variety of food to cater for western/asian guest and there were plenty of tables available inside and out. If you wanted to head into the main town for the night market, restaurants, bars or conveinence store, you can either take a 15 minute stroll alternatively the resort  offers a buggy service for small fee. During our stay only tower 2 was operational as it wasnt peak season however all facilities and activies remained funtional. The great thing about this resort is that there is an long outdoor and heated indoor pool if the weather isn't too kind. There is also a games room to keep the kids busy for a couple of hours but also massage seats to keep adults happy. Theres also a rooftop bar which most people only go for the sunset and the vibe is really chill cos of the good music selection.
Overall it was a very pleasant stay as we wanted to be away from the overcrowded Halong bay but have the same experience.
Would definately come back!

reviews.title: Peaceful Paradise with Excellent Service
reviews.positives:
The staff were incredibly helpful and went above and beyond to answer all our questions - special greetings to Mai Ahn and Nick.
The Wi-Fi was super fast and reliable. I even had a two-hour online training session with no issues at all.
Our 2-year-old son loved the Four Seasons Pool! The water and air temperature were perfect.
We had a lovely room with a balcony overlooking the lush greenery. It was the perfect spot to relax and unwind in the evenings.
The food at the restaurants and bars was delicious, and the service was quick and efficient. We especially enjoyed dining at the beach restaurant in the evenings.
There was a great selection of food at all the restaurants.
The transparent kayaks were a fun way to explore!
The Skywalk offered amazing views.
Breakfast was a real treat, with a wide variety of Western and Asian options.
reviews.negatives: Some facilities were out of order due to a recent typhoon, but the staff were working hard to get everything back up and running.

reviews.text: In the morning, when you open the curtains, it's a hotel with a sea view. It was nice to be able to eat comfortably, swim in the pool, use the sauna, and even get a massage. The breakfast buffet is especially delicious, especially the rice noodles. There are a lot of very small ants in the bathroom and the room.

solo tienes incluido el quedarte en la habitación y desayuno. Cualquier otra cosa en el hotel es todo de pago , y el doble o triple de lo que te puede costar fuera del hotel.   Cuando vas ha pedir información de actividades que se pueden hacer en la isla , te contestan que no tienen esas actividades o que no saben. Es la primera ves que veo que el personal de un Hotel pasa directamente del cliente. No te ayudan en nada. reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: - I used the Massa service in building 2 and asked the staff at the bathroom to help me get my things because I forgot them. She straightforwardly told me, "You can go in and get it yourself!" However, another staff member quickly asked me what I needed and helped me. Nonetheless, I am still not very satisfied with the service here; I went for breakfast during peak hours and there were no tables available, but the staff did not assist me and left me to find a table on my own. During peak hours, it took a long time to wait for the electric shuttle. Everything else was okay, the room was nice and quiet. I booked a Premier Mountain View room on the 17th floor, but right now, all I see are fallen trees on the hillside. Everyone who booked a sea view room probably has a better view.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
La ubicación perfecta. La habitación es muy bonita y hay de todo en las instalaciones. Tienes que pagar algunas de ellas(spa,recreativos).
Paisajes muy bonitos
reviews.negatives: Resort demasiado grande. Hay mucha gente en las horas puntas. A la hora del check out (11,12h) no hay nadie y puedes aprovechar para estar solo en las piscinas y playa.

reviews.title: Lovely Stay
reviews.text: Lovely hotel but could improve a few things with lots to do but could be improved. The swimming pool water in the inside pool is disgusting (urine and BO smell). Also only one place to eat in the weekdays (unless you want a buffet) is really bad for a hotel of this size. the pool bar only sells food on weekends i believe which is strange as the hotel was apparently 97% full in the week.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Las instalaciones y la playa justo en frente
reviews.negatives: Complejo grande pero mal organizado! Mucho personal pero las prestaciones y servicios son escasos o no incluidos para los huéspedes!

reviews.title: Flamingo is a wonderful place to enjoy the beauty of Cát Bà Island.
reviews.text:
Even just within the resort, you can find everything you need — a lovely beach, entertainment, and health and wellness facilities. It’s also conveniently located, with easy access to restaurants in the downtown area and boat tours around the bay.

The location is fantastic, the service is great, and the staff are friendly and helpful. I booked my room during a special sale week and got a great price.

I would definitely recommend Flamingo to friends and family — and I’d love to come back again!

reviews.title: Estancia en hotel de playa
reviews.positives: La ubicación, excelente. El desayuno, muy, muy bien, y la ubicación, a tocar de las playas de Cat Ba. Es un gran complejo de playa muy bien situado, algo lejos del pueblo y del resto de servicios de Cat Ba, pero no es complicado moverse
reviews.negatives: Al ser un hotel de playa muchos clientes se movían por el hotel sin calzado y totalmente mojados, dejando el suelo totalmente mojado. Creo que el hotel debería ser proactivo en pedir en repartir toallas y pedir que los clientes se secaran, al final es un peligro resbalar de lo mojado que está todo. Obvio que los niños son niños y no se dan cuenta, pero el hotel debería hacer algo más para minimizarlo. Soy consciente que no se puede evitar del todo, pero si hay mucho campo de mejora

reviews.title: Bãi biển tuyệt đẹp
reviews.text: Đây là lần đầu mình đến Cát Bà, được bạn bè giới thiệu nên đã chọn Flamingo Resort. Không làm mình thất vọng, bãi Cát Cò 1-2 tuyệt đẹp, các bạn staff cũng rất thân thiện. Cực kỳ xứng đáng với giá tiền <3

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
El alojamiento es cómodo pero está lejos del centro lo cual te obliga a cenar en el hotel. Así mismo es accesible.
Estamos decepcionados con el hotel. Fue gastar muchísimo dinero para q nadie nos informe nada. 
Hoy a las 7 am queríamos ir a desayunar y no había nadie en recepción como para que nos indicaran adónde ir ...solo estaba la chica que limpia y ni con traductor entendía.

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: Fabulous location, away from the current reclaimed land development project. Perfect for a peaceful stay,close to the town.

Dù nhà mình đi vào đúng mùa cao điểm, khách sạn gần như full phòng nhưng đồ ăn buffet vẫn đa dạng, các bữa ăn ở nhà hàng trong KS ngon, phù hợp với cả người già và trẻ nhỏ.  Bãi biển tắm hơi đông và bể bơi trong nhà hơi nhỏ.

reviews.title: Good value hotel

reviews.negatives: Aunque es muy lindo, la bañera no tiene cortina y el baño se inunda al ducharse.

reviews.negatives: Todo muy bien

My only slight issue was that the AC in my room was not effective. However, in telling the staff they provided me a fan swiftly for quick and comfortable resolution. I would definitely come here again.

reviews.title: Un havre de paix
reviews.text:
Nous sommes venus nous reposer 3 jours dans cet hôtel après une croisière sur la baie d halong. L hôtel est littéralement sur 2 des 3 plages du sud de l' île avec une vue imprenable des chambres vue sur mer .
Petit déjeuner incroyable, bar avec vue panoramique, chambre spacieuse
reviews.response:
Merci beaucoup pour votre magnifique retour !

Nous sommes ravis d’apprendre que vous avez passé un séjour reposant parmi nous après votre croisière dans la baie d’Ha Long. C’est un plaisir de savoir que vous avez apprécié notre emplacement privilégié entre deux plages, la vue imprenable depuis votre chambre, ainsi que le petit-déjeuner et le bar panoramique.

Nous sommes également heureux que le confort et l’espace de votre chambre aient contribué à rendre votre expérience encore plus agréable.

Ce serait un réel plaisir de vous accueillir à nouveau pour un prochain séjour tout aussi paisible.

Cordialement,
L’équipe de l’hôtel

reviews.positives: Trés belle vue, lit confortable, petit déjeuner ok.
reviews.negatives:
Cet hôtel n'est pas ce qu'il promet (hors saison). Aucune explication du personnel concernant les navettes, chambre vieillissante (trace dans la baignoire, miroir oxydé,...), propreté pas au top. 
Le restaurant à la carte était notre pire expérience. Attente de 40 mon alors qu'il n'y avait qu'une seule autre table, nourriture servie froide, plats servis alors que je n'avais pas fini mon entrée, mon assiette n'a jamais été débarrassée, quantité ridicule. 
Le paiement au bar comme au restaurant sont un casse tête. La serveuse est partie en courant avec ma carte bancaire plusieurs fois. 
Lors du chekout, il est nécessaire d'attendre qu'ils contrôlent la chambre.

reviews.title: Très décevant
reviews.positives: La vue depuis la chambre était magnifique
reviews.negatives:
Très déçu de notre séjour dans cet établissement. Nous avions pris une suite en pensant nous faire un gros plaisir durant notre séjour au Vietnam. 
L’accueil était catastrophique (verre d’accueil donné à la va vite debout au milieu du hall, transfert en voiturette vers un autre bâtiment : voiturette qui démarre alors que je n’ai qu’un pieds dedans puis fait tomber un des sacs qu’ils avaient posé à l’avant) , le personnel peu aidant et peu présent. Nous avions clairement senti que nous dérangions de part le fait que nous étions pas vietnamien. Les petite voiturette descendant en ville nous ont été refusé sans motif apparent. C’est également le seul hôtel qui a refusé de nous aider pour organiser notre transfert vers Hanoï. 
Nous devions avoir une chambre de 120m2 qui finalement n’en faisait que 60m2.  Le ménage n’était pas parfait comme laissait voir des traces très suggestive sur la baie vitrée de la terrasse.  
Nous avions commandé au room service au bout de 30mn on nous prévient que le four ne marche pas et que nous devons changer de plat tout cela en ayant déjà livré les deux premiers plats. Nous avons donc mangé en décaler et cela sans aucune excuse ou geste commercial. 
Le personnel ne parlant pas anglais, il était difficile de se faire comprendre.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice place with warm pool, scenic view of Lan Ha Bay

reviews.title: Décevant, pas reposant
reviews.positives: L’emplacement, jolie vue, moderne, belles chambres
reviews.negatives:
Décevant et beaucoup trop de bruit!!!! 
Du bruit très tôt le matin dans les couloirs, la musique à fond dans les chambres voisines, trop de monde, un brouah constant, file d’attente pour prendre les ascenseur, les piscines sont belles mais deviennent rapidement insupportable à cause des cris de partout.
Dommage, l’endroit n’était pas reposant.

reviews.title: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ A Place That Truly Feels Like Home – Flamingo
reviews.text:
My stay at Flamingo Resort was so wonderful that what was meant to be a short visit turned into 10 unforgettable days. I originally planned to leave earlier but ended up extending my stay by an extra week because this place genuinely felt like home.

What truly sets this experience apart is the staff—especially Trường Nhật, the manager who went far above and beyond to make my stay feel special. His kindness, attentiveness, and genuine care touched my heart. He even surprised me with a personalized gift engraved with my name, something I will always treasure.

Every day, the team thoughtfully packed fresh fruit and coffee for my daily adventures around Cát Bà, making exploring effortless and enjoyable. Not to mention, the food was absolutely amazing—I enjoyed delicious meals every single day at the gorgeous restaurant, with each dish beautifully prepared and full of flavor.

And the spa is absolutely beautiful—a peaceful, luxurious space perfect for relaxation after a day of exploring.

I’ve traveled across Vietnam for four months and stayed at many hotels along the way. Without a doubt, Nhật Trường stands out above all. His exceptional hospitality, professionalism, and warmth are rare and unforgettable.

Flamingo is not just a beautiful resort—it’s a place filled with heart, care, and genuine connection. I am already looking forward to returning next year, and I know exactly where I’ll be staying.

Highly recommended. Truly exceptional in every way. 🌿✨

reviews.title: Bel emplacement mais séjour décevant (personnel procédurier, chambre petite, bruyant le matin)
reviews.positives: Bon emplacement. Très belle vue.
reviews.negatives: Personnel procédurier. Chambre beaucoup plus petite qu'annoncée. Très mauvaise isolation phonique (réveillé très tôt chaque matin par le bruit dans les couloirs).

reviews.title: Great hotel with beautiful view!
reviews.text:
Very comfortable hotel with beautiful views.
Breakfast was very good but lunch was disappointing. We tried the beef burger and the fried rice. 
Just one of the restaurants was open during our stay, so we can not say if the other ones are better. We ended up just having breakfast at the hotel and other meals in town.
It’s very easy to reach the little town center by foot.
The staff was very welcoming and polite.
One suggestion is that at least the transfer to town would be complimentary. You have to pay for all activities ( pool table, game room, karaoke, etc.) other them the pool and the beach.

reviews.positives: Pas grand-chose pour être honnête
reviews.negatives: Supermarché des vacanciers; usine à touristes. Si vous recherchez un hôtel cosy à fuir absolument.

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.text: The place is in a need of a refresh, and food quality can be better. Nevertheless, the staff are friendly and helpful, and the grounds and room are spacious. One of the better hotels in Cat Ba.

reviews.positives: L’emplacement et le design/concept des bâtiments.
reviews.negatives: Pas propre, très mal entretenu. Appartement vieillissant et travaux mal réalisés (pose du carrelage, joint silicone, plaque chauffante manquante remplacer par une vulgaire plaque de contreplaqué. Magasin souvenir mal rangé et presque 1 cm de poussière sur les étagères.

reviews.title: Awesome stay!
reviews.text: We had an amazing stay at Flamingo resort, everything was taken care of, and breakfast service was top notch.

reviews.title: A fuir , choisir les deux hotel a coté .
reviews.positives: Bon petit dejeuner , Dommage qu’il n’y ai pas de café type expresso ou cappuccino , Pas de lait chaud , difficile de se faire comprendre . Salle bondé et tres bruyante ,Clients mal éduqué , cris , hurlements , bousculade aux buffets aucun respect . Une horreur 🥵
reviews.negatives:
De ne pas avoir le choix de commander des boissons chaude au petit dejeuner même payante si besoin .Viennoiserie de mauvaise qualité , confiture de syntese et beurre presque fondu 😭   Cet hotel n’est pas au point pour recevoir une clientèle européenne.  Pas de mini bar dans les chambres . 
personnels ne parlant pas anglais sauf 2 filles a la réception , dont My qui s’est très bien occupé de nous et qui a rendu notre séjour un peu plus vivable … Pour un 5 étoiles ça ne le fait pas du tout  .. 3 etoiles max ..
Les clients asiatique laissent les portes de chambre ouvertes et se parlent en hurlant , les enfants cours dans les couloirs en hurlants , les adultes idem jusqu’a environ 1 hrs du matin 🥵. 
Toute l'après midi le bar vide de clients diffuse de la music techno jusqu’a 23h pour faire chier le monde .Malgré mes trois tentatives a la reception pour faire baisser le son , lettre morte sans aucun resultat .  
impossible de se reposer au bord de la piscine , idem dans les chambre , la musique monte jusqu’au 17 eme étage ou était notre chambre .. même vitre fermée c’était intenable..

reviews.title: good building and facilities, but small beach/pool
reviews.text: If you get this hotel on a deal, it is amazing. The building is pretty new, and the breakfast was great. However, the pool and beach are quite small. The tide does come up pretty close so at certain times there is only space for a few beach chairs. Also, the dinner buffet is way worse than the breakfast, with less variety, so the dinner buffet is not worth it at all. The nearby restaurants are a ~15 min walk so it's slightly inconvenient.

reviews.title: Ce n’est pas un hôtel 5 étoiles
reviews.positives: L’emplacement en bord de mer est agréable et les chambres bien équipés
reviews.negatives:
Le personnel de l’établissement ne parle pas anglais et fuis les clients des qu’il faut parler en anglais.
Le mini bar est vide et le petit déjeuner était toujours le même et sans saveur. 
Le service de nettoyage de la chambre n’était pas bon

reviews.negatives:

- Le chambre et les espaces communs ne sont pas propres, du moins pas digne d’un resort (cheveux, insectes au rez de chaussé, sable, poussières et taches sol et mur)

Pour les fois prochaines, je choisirais un hôtel à taille humaine pour un séjour plus agréable.

reviews.title: A Heartfelt Birthday Surprise Made Perfect by Thao’s Exceptional Care
reviews.text:
My wife and I spent one unforgettable night at Flamingo Resort to celebrate her birthday, and the experience exceeded every expectation thanks in large part to the incredible service from receptionist Thao.
From the moment I mentioned it was a special occasion, Thao sprang into action with genuine enthusiasm. She helped me source a stunning bouquet featuring my wife’s favorite sunflowers and personally ensured the room was beautifully decorated with a delicious cake, candles, and thoughtful touches that brought tears to my wife’s eyes. Her attention to detail, warmth, and proactive kindness transformed a simple stay into a cherished memory.
The room was spotless, the staff attentive, and the resort serene but it was Thao’s personal care that truly made the night magical. If you’re celebrating something special, ask for Thao. She doesn’t just do her job; she creates moments that last a lifetime.

5 stars highly recommended

reviews.title: Bel établissement (bruyant) avec prestations dont la qualité de service attendue pour un 5 étoiles ne sont pas au rdv.
reviews.positives:

- Beaucoup de végétations y compris sur les balcons

- 6 ascenseurs en service dans chaque tour mais le système d’appel est inefficace. 
- Le personnel est gentil mais ne parle pas bien anglais et n’est pas bien organisé : c’est le bazar au Check in et Check out (hall bondé et désorganisé), commande au restaurant plutôt laborieuse, etc. Certains personnels nouvellement arrivés ne semblent pas être accompagnés pour être formés.

reviews.title: A resort with great beaches, views, and atmosphere.
reviews.text: The water temperature, spatial depth, and waves at Caco Beach were optimal for swimming, and the private resort beach and public beach each had their own characteristics. Therefore, we used the private resort beach in the afternoon and the public beach in the morning. In the afternoon, after swimming, we enjoyed the pool under the night lights at sunset, and in the morning, we walked along the coastal promenade, which helped with breakfast digestion. The meals seemed to be served with a Vietnamese touch. Room service took over an hour, which was frustrating, but the food was good. Although we were supposed to be assigned a premium room, we were assigned a deluxe room, and this issue is yet to be resolved. I sent several questions via email before visiting the resort, and I was able to get some answers. I enjoyed seeing lizards outdoors here; it can be considered a resort well integrated with nature. The facilities and views inside the accommodation are excellent. Crossing the bridge to move between three resorts was also a unique experience (there's a passage that protects from the rain). After checkout, we took a speedboat from Cat Ba pier, which took about 15 minutes to reach Tuan Chau harbor to board a 6-star cruise. The speedboat provides convenience for visiting Flamingo Resort.

reviews.title: The representative resort of Cat Ba Island.
reviews.text: We stayed for a total of 4 nights on Cat Ba Island, spending the first 2 days at a budget hotel and the remaining two days at Flamingo Resort. This allowed us to clearly feel the differences compared to other hotels. The room condition was satisfactory, and the staff were very friendly and professional in their service. Since it was the weekend, there was a lively atmosphere with many locals, but we had a great time enjoying the pool, beach, and other facilities. Lastly, 'Hanh' kindly helped us with our bus reservation to Hanoi, ensuring we could get there safely. I particularly enjoyed the time spent kayaking in front of the resort; it wasn't expensive, so I recommend enjoying the activities too!

reviews.title: Great place to relax on cat ba island
reviews.text:
The staff were exceptional. Cat Ba Flamingo 1 had Cuong and he helped me through so many issues and questions.

The valet helped us find lost luggage left in a taxi. Using their cameras they were able to find and return our things. Couldn’t say anything bad about the staff at Flamingo 1.

Due to the typhoon, Flamingo 3 and many amenities were closed. Which is understandable and they are working on repairs non-stop. They are working on getting everything back up to where it used to be.

Our room was quite clean but found a few missed sweeping spots. The safe in our room wasn’t closing properly so we used a lock for our suitcase. 

Great selection of tv channels! Have not been to a hotel yet that offered such a variety and your name is on the menu screen as a greeting. 

The private beach was a great relief because you always worry about yourself and your things. But we left our shoes by the chairs and walked along the beach for quite some time.

The breakfast we had was buffet style. There are a lot of guests but they work hard to keep everything stocked. I found the food bland at times, it comes with large buffets when there is a lot of quantity. But there are condiments around to help get the food to your taste.

There weren’t many bars open which made finding drinks hard. But the strip outside the hotel down the road has plenty of restaurants and shops. The nightlife is quite lively and for kids you can rent light up bikes/etc.

If you get dropped by by bus or anything else, make sure you get an electric car up to the hotel. It is only $10,000 per person in a full car and $50,000 per car if there are fewer than 4 possibly? We were a family of 3. Don’t take a cab or let anyone grab your bag. They will charge you $100,000dong just to go over the hill (we got bamboozled). Stick with the hotel and ask questions when you need to. Don’t let anyone push you around to take something you’re not comfortable with. 

We look forward to coming back with more of our family and hopefully by then, most of the construction will be done.

Chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn sự lựa chọn Flamingo Cát Bà của bạn cho kỳ nghỉ gần đây và chúng tôi rất biết ơn vì phản hồi tốt đẹp của bạn. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng kỳ nghỉ của bạn là nguồn cảm hứng vô tận, đặc biệt là lòng hiếu khách của đội ngũ tận tụy của chúng tôi. Chúng tôi cam kết duy trì các tiêu chuẩn cao góp phần tạo nên trải nghiệm tích cực của bạn. Cảm ơn bạn đã gửi những phản hồi có giá trị và chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ có niềm vui được chào đón bạn trở lại Flamingo Cát Bà trong tương lai.
Trân trọng,
Đội ngũ quản lý khách sạn

reviews.title: Nice resort with great facilities
reviews.text: I chose to stay at Cat ba island for 2D1N with my mom as part of my mom birthday celebration. The resort is pretty new with big room, comfortable bed and great facilities. Totally enjoy the short trip, my mom likes it as the beach is just at Level 1 and the swimming pool is nice and downstairs also. Everything is easily accessible. You can just rent the electric car to go to some places in the centre. Highly recommend this resort for those traveling with parents or kids.

We are truly delighted to know that both you and your mother enjoyed your stay, especially the spacious room, comfortable bed, convenient facilities, beautiful beach access, and swimming pool area. It is wonderful to hear that the resort’s accessibility and peaceful environment helped make your short getaway relaxing and memorable.

We are especially grateful for your recommendation for families traveling with parents or children. Creating comfortable and enjoyable experiences for multi-generational families is something we always strive for.

Thank you once again for your kind words. We sincerely hope to welcome you and your family back for another memorable stay in the near future.

Warm regards,
Flamingo Cat Ba Resort Team

I got a 2 bedroom s apartment and we are a family of 5, 2 big kids and a small one.  I just need to add a small bed for my 8 year old  for a  small fee.   The only thing was the extra bed couldn’t fit in the 2nd bedroom , it only fit in the master bedroom or the living room.  Breakfast was excellent too, had lots of choices to choose from. reviews.title: Definitely in 1608.
reviews.text: First, I booked two 1-bedroom premier ocean view rooms for my parents, one on the 16th floor with a proper open ocean view, and one on the 15th floor with a view obstructed by something. I don’t understand why we don’t get the ocean view for the same price. When I complained, they showed me a room on the 8th floor. This room is dark and has a poor view when you go down in floors. I expressed that I didn't really like it, and they told me that a room with an open ocean view was available on the 15th floor. I agreed, but it was a strange situation where a room would become available the very same evening. I booked here specifically because of the view, so the other room is meaningless. I really want the 16th-floor penthouse rooms 1610, 1608, or 1606 as they have the best views. It must be a 1-bedroom premier ocean view. The facilities are great, with fun amenities like a game room, billiards, and karaoke, and it’s not far from the main street. Using the electric carts from the hotel is expensive, but if you catch one on the street, it costs only 10,000 dong per person. If you book through the hotel, it’s 30,000 dong per person. There’s one TV in the living room and one in the bedroom, making it very convenient, and the bathtub has transparent glass so you can watch TV while taking a bath, which is nice. There are temperature controls in both the room and living room, and all the staff speak English well and are friendly. The breakfast is diverse, delicious, and has a nice view. This place is a must-visit for newlyweds or couples at least once. It requires a minimum stay of 3 days. The seaside promenade is amazing, and the cloud bridge and observation deck within the hotel are fantastic. You should get massages at the hotel instead of elsewhere since the outside is dirty, and there's no significant price difference. There’s also a hot spring spa. The indoor pool is a bit cold, but luckily there’s a sauna.

reviews.title: Spring trip to Cat Ba 2026
reviews.text:
I just had a vacation at Flamingo Cat Ba Beach Resort and I am truly very satisfied; it is indeed a place worth staying and experiencing.

The resort has a beautiful, modern, and extremely clean environment. The sea and mountain views here are simply impressive, especially when watching the sunrise or sunset. The amenities are complete, from the pool, restaurant to the playground – everything is very well cared for, providing a total relaxation feeling.

In particular, I am very grateful to Ms. Mai Anh for her extremely quick and enthusiastic support. Thanks to her, I was assisted in upgrading to a one-bedroom unit with a better view. The quick processing, friendly, and professional attitude left me even more impressed with the quality of service here.

In summary, this was a very good experience and I will definitely return in the future. If everyone is looking for a beautiful and convenient resort with dedicated service, then Flamingo Cat Ba is a choice worth considering.

reviews.title: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ A Place That Truly Feels Like Home – Flamingo
reviews.text:
My stay at Flamingo Resort was so wonderful that what was meant to be a short visit turned into 10 unforgettable days. I originally planned to leave earlier but ended up extending my stay by an extra week because this place genuinely felt like home.

What truly sets this experience apart are the staff—especially Trường Nhật, the manager who went far above and beyond to make my stay feel special. His kindness, attentiveness, and genuine care touched my heart. He even surprised me with a personalized gift engraved with my name, something I will always treasure.

Every day, the team thoughtfully packed fresh fruit and coffee for my daily adventures around Cát Bà, making exploring effortless and enjoyable. Not to mention, the food was absolutely amazing—I enjoyed delicious meals every single day at the gorgeous restaurant, with each dish beautifully prepared and full of flavor.

And the spa is absolutely beautiful—a peaceful, luxurious space perfect for relaxation after a day of exploring.

I’ve traveled across Vietnam for four months and stayed at many hotels along the way. Without a doubt, Nhật Trường stands out above all. His exceptional hospitality, professionalism, and warmth are rare and unforgettable.

Flamingo is not just a beautiful resort—it’s a place filled with heart, care, and genuine connection. I am already looking forward to returning next year, and I know exactly where I’ll be staying.

Highly recommended. Truly exceptional in every way. 🌿✨

reviews.title: 🌺 Flamingo Resort Cát Bà – Luxury Beyond Luxury
reviews.text:
If you’re coming to Cát Bà, Flamingo Resort is the place you’ll notice first—and for all the right reasons. The moment we saw it from the market area, the architecture and the sea-facing layout completely stole our attention. It honestly became one of the main reasons we booked it, and we were lucky enough to get a great VIM deal with breakfast included.

Getting there was simple. The bus drops you near the main market—about 600 meters from the resort—and from there a quick electric caddy takes you inside the sanctuary zone. And then… the scale hits you. The property is humongous. It’s easily one of the best resorts in Cát Bà at this price point, with a completely unobstructed ocean view that feels unreal.

The facilities are next level. Breakfast alone has around 150 dishes—no exaggeration—which means everyone finds something they love. Steam, sauna, a temperature-controlled pool, an outdoor pool, karaoke rooms, a full play zone for kids, bike rentals… they’ve packed everything into this place. Our check-in was smooth, and the room was large and comfortable. We took the Mountain View room (the sea view was three times the price), but the 17th-floor deck completely made up for it. The panoramic sea view from up there is something you can’t skip. The Skywalk is another must-visit inside the property.

Service was consistently warm, quick, and easy to communicate with. Honestly, Flamingo feels like a destination of its own. If you’re coming to Cát Bà, avoid doing a hop-in hop-out. Stay at least two days and explore the resort properly—you will not regret it. It’s luxury beyond luxury, and one of the best stays we’ve had on the island.

Highly recommended.

reviews.title: The Resort We Were Never Meant to Find — And Now We’ll Never Forget
reviews.text:
Flamingo Cat Ba Resort was never even on our travel list. We only came to Cat Ba to escape the chaos of Hanoi for a couple of days… and it became the greatest surprise and best decision of our entire Vietnam trip. We were meant to stay 2 nights — we stayed 5 nights, cancelled accommodation elsewhere, and honestly wished we could stay forever.

This resort has changed how we travel.

From the moment we arrived, we felt like we had stepped into a completely different world. The views are unreal, the setting is breathtaking, and the entire resort feels peaceful, luxurious, and welcoming all at once — and somehow still completely perfect for families with kids.

We rented a scooter directly from the resort, and it was so easy, safe, and fun to ride around the island. Even with kids, we felt totally comfortable exploring Cat Ba at our own pace. It ended up being one of our favourite parts of the experience.

Now let’s talk about the kids — because this resort is a dream for families.
Our children absolutely loved it here. Between the multiple pools, the kids’ play areas, and the huge open spaces, they were in heaven. Every single day they asked, “Can we stay here forever?” And honestly… we felt the same way.

The beach is beautiful and calm, with stunning views and crystal-clear water — perfect for families and relaxing swims. Watching the kids play while the limestone cliffs surround you is something we will never forget.

The food deserves its own applause. The breakfast buffet is incredible — huge variety, fresh everything, western food, Vietnamese food, pastries, fruit, hot meals… it had absolutely everything. We ate like royalty every morning and looked forward to breakfast every single day. Even our kids found foods they loved easily, which isn’t always the case while travelling.

The spa and onsen are on another level entirely. After long days of travel and scooter adventures, soaking in the onsen with those views was pure magic. It is not just a spa — it is an experience. Peaceful, luxurious, and something we will genuinely miss.

But what truly made this stay unforgettable was the hotel manager, Bac.
We have travelled a lot, and we have never, ever experienced service like this. Bac went above and beyond in every possible way. He answered every question — even when he was off shift, always with kindness, warmth, and genuine care. He made us feel like family, not just guests. We were so lucky to meet him — Australia would be so lucky to steal him one day! He is an absolute credit to this resort and to hospitality as a whole.

Because of Bac and the incredible team, this place now holds a very special place in our hearts.

This resort turned a random last-minute stop into the most memorable destination of our entire trip. It gave our family rest, joy, connection, laughter, luxury, adventure, and memories we will treasure forever.

We didn’t just stay here.
We lived here, even for a short time — and that difference is everything.

We will be back. Without question.
Flamingo Cat Ba is not just a resort — it is a place you feel.

Thank you for giving our family the most unforgettable experience of our lives — especially Bac . 💛
